allow: PowerShell($timeout = 90; $elapsed = 0; Write-Output "Aguardando backend..."; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $elapsed += 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"x","password":"x"}' -ErrorAction Stop; break } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response -ne $null\) { Write-Output "Backend pronto em ${elapsed}s"; break } } }; Write-Output "Elapsed: ${elapsed}s")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $token = $login.token; Write-Output "Login OK, token: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)..."; $processes = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/processes" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Output "Processos retornados: $\($processes.Count\)"; if \($processes.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Output "Primeiro: $\($processes[0].title\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "mvn" -ArgumentList "spring-boot:run" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\hugob\\OneDrive\\Documentos\\site-nets-sprint\\backend" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 25; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Frontend OK: status $\($r.StatusCode\), tamanho $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Output "Erro: $_" })
